graphPanZoomHint: Drag to pan, scroll to zoom.
graph3dHint: Drag to orbit, scroll to zoom. Teal links: parent to child. Gray links: refer-tos. Click a map node to select it in the tree; click a resource to open it.
wikiSpaceGraphInteractionHint: Drag to pan, scroll to zoom. Click a note to open it. Larger dots are more connected. If distant notes shrink the view, use Fit main cluster (expand icon) to frame the dense part.
